预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 湖南师范大学医学类在山西省近五年最低录取位次波动剧烈：2021年16829位（计划12人）、2022年10757位（计划2人，缩招致位次大幅上升）、2023年27801位（计划12人，扩 招致位次回落）、2024年4998位（计划10人，位次异常升高）、2025年17684位（计划缩至6人，位次回落但仍高于2021年水平）。2026年医学类招生计划为6人（临床医学4人、预 防医学2人），与2025年持平，无扩缩变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、双一流建设高校，位于湖南省长沙市，虽以师范见长，但其医学部（咸嘉湖校区）在省内具有较高办学水平，临床医学、预防医学等 专业在山西省考生中具备一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持高报考热度，临床医学尤为突出。山西省考生对省外211院校医学专业的认可度较高，湖南师范大学医学部在山西投放计划较少（仅6人），稀 缺性进一步推高了竞争程度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及近年位次趋势，2026年湖南师范大学医学类在山西省最低录取位次预计为17949名左右，较2025年（17684名）略有上升（更难进），波动区间为17500-183 98名。建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Shanxi Province over the past five years have fluctuated significantly: 2021: 16829 (plan: 12), 2022: 10757 (plan: 2, ranking rose sharply due to reduced enrollment), 2023: 27801 (plan: 12, ranking fell due to expanded enrollment), 2024: 4998 (plan: 10, ranking abnormally high), 2025: 17684 (plan: reduced to 6, ranking fell but still higher than 2021 level). In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is 6 (Clinical Medicine: 4, Preventive Medicine: 2), unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. Although it is known for teacher training, its medical school (Xianjiahu Campus) has a high level of education within the province, and majors such as Clinical Medicine and Preventive Medicine have a certain appeal to candidates in Shanxi Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application enthusiasm nationwide, with Clinical Medicine being particularly prominent. Candidates in Shanxi Province have a high recognition of medical programs at 211 universities outside the province. Hunan Normal University's medical school has a small enrollment plan in Shanxi (only 6), and the scarcity further increases competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and recent ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Shanxi Province in 2026 is expected to be around 17949, slightly higher (more difficult to enter) than 2025 (17684), with a fluctuation range of 17500-18398. It is recommended that candidates plan their applications reasonably within this range.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
(No other medical majors enrolling in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Preventive Medicine as the main target, use Tier 1 Clinical Medicine as a reach, and there is no Tier 3 safety major available. You need to coordinate with medical programs from other universities for a comprehensive application.
